title: noaa-gml-file-reader: Read NOAA GML atmospheric trace-gas ASCII files as pandas DataFrames
description: A Python library that reads NOAA Global Monitoring Laboratory (GML/ESRL) atmospheric trace-gas (CO2, CH4) ASCII data files - surface-flask event/monthly and in-situ hourly ccgg products - into tidy pandas DataFrames, auto-detecting the header dialect and parsing the documented missing-value sentinels.
